items.name: Brown Polka Knit Off-Shoulder Sweater
items.description:
Soft knit sweater with an off-shoulder neckline and oversized sleeves, designed to subtly reveal the shoulders while keeping the hands tucked inside for a cozy, shy silhouette. The brown base with delicate polka dot pattern adds a playful geek-chic charm. Warm, cute, and effortlessly stylish — perfect for soft academic and cozy fits.

🔗 Ora’Bella: https://www.roblox.com/communities/1072106749/OraBella#!/store
